title: We Are the Champions
why_this_song: Present-perfect anthem ('I've paid my dues', 'I've taken my bows') — a concentrated drill on a single tense. Globally recognized, so recognition aids comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: noun; 'make mistakes' is a high-frequency phrase

grammar_callouts: present perfect: I've paid / I've taken / I've had
no ordinary X — no + adjective + noun

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "We Are the Champions" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "We Are the Champions" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "champions" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "champions" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Present perfect in EN vs past simple in PT is a classic confusion zone — this song exposes it across an entire verse. Spend a full 10 minutes on that comparison.

lines: We are the champions, my friends
And we'll keep on fighting till the end
We are the champions, we are the champions
No time for losers, 'cause we are the champions of the world
We are the champions, my friends
And we'll keep on fighting till the end, oh
We are the champions, we are the champions
No time for losers, 'cause we are the champions
